query:
ALTER TABLE receipts
  ADD COLUMN intentHash VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT '' AFTER intentId,
  ADD COLUMN actionHash VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT '' AFTER action,
  ADD COLUMN verificationStatus VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'skipped' AFTER signature,
  ADD COLUMN verificationHash VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT '' AFTER verificationStatus,
  ADD COLUMN riskScore FLOAT DEFAULT 0 AFTER verificationHash,
  ADD COLUMN riskLevel VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT '' AFTER riskScore,
  ADD COLUMN policyRuleId VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT '' AFTER riskLevel,
  ADD COLUMN policyDecision VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT '' AFTER policyRuleId,
  ADD COLUMN protocolVersion VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT 'v2' AFTER policyDecision;

ALTER TABLE ledger
  ADD COLUMN receiptHash VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT '' AFTER decision,
  ADD COLUMN ledgerSignature TEXT AFTER currentHash,
  ADD COLUMN protocolVersion VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT 'v2' AFTER ledgerSignature;
